---
title: "References"
bibliography: references.bib
sidebar: example-sidebar
---

Quarto supports citations and bibliographies via standard `.bib` files — no plugins needed.

## How It Works

1. Create a `references.bib` file with BibTeX entries.
2. Add `bibliography: references.bib` to the page's YAML frontmatter.
3. Cite anywhere in the text using `[@key]`.

The bibliography is rendered automatically at the end of the page.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Example
Writing `[@quarto]` in your text produces the inline citation: [@quarto]

The full entry appears below under *References*.
:::

## Tools Used in This Example

All interactive features on this site are powered by open-source tools:

- **Quarto** [@quarto] — the publishing system behind this entire site
- **Pyodide** [@pyodide] — runs Python directly in the browser (see [Code](ep_code.qmd))
- **JSXGraph** [@jsxgraph] — interactive mathematics in the browser (see [Visualizations](ep_visuals.qmd))
